name: Maya Okafor
bio: MIT mathematics PhD candidate. Specialises in unblocking students stuck on proofs and abstract concepts.

name: Daniel Reyes
bio: Former CERN researcher turned teacher. Makes mechanics and EM feel obvious.

name: Sofia Lindqvist
bio: Polyglot tutor based in Berlin. Conversation-first, grammar-when-you-need-it.

bio: Senior engineer at a Series-B startup. Coaches beginners and CS undergrads alike.

name: Nora Brennan
bio: Veteran A-Level tutor with a knack for diagrams that finally make organic chem click.

bio: Test-prep strategist. Built the diagnostic engine behind our matching system.
